name: Dudhni Lake
state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
description: Known as the 'Kashmir of the West', this massive reservoir of the Madhuban Dam is surrounded by hillocks and offers shikara rides, kayaking, and jet skiing.
history: Formed by the backwaters of the Madhuban Dam built across the Daman Ganga River, it has been developed into a premier water sports hub by the tourism department.
famousFor: Water sports, shikara rides, and scenic sunset views.
